name: Maelstrom
description: A hammer forged for the gods themselves, Maelstrom allows its user to harness the power of lightning.

abilities.name: Chain Lightning
abilities.description: Grants the wielder's attacks a chance to pierce through evasion, and to release a bolt of electricity on the target, that leaps between other nearby targets, dealing magical damage to all of them. Cooldown: 0.2. Proc Chance: 25%. Bounce Distance: 650. Number of Bounces: 4. Damage: 110.
